figures.caption: Figure 1 (a) User interface of the Track Hub Quickload Translator showing a UCSC track hub URL converted i an IGB Quickload URL. The Quickload can be added to a running instance of IGB by clicking on the Add to IG button. (b) User interface of the Track Hub Quickload Translator showing an IGB Quickload URL converted into track hub URL. The converted URL can be added as a track hub to the UCSC Genome Browser on the UCSC
